name: saureus_usa300_IS256_copy2
description: Insertion sequence IS256 copy 2 of 2 in this genome. 1324 bp IS256 family element; staphylococcal aminoglycoside-resistance transposons Tn4001 and Tn5281 are flanked by IS256. IS elements are mobile and create paralog signal across distant genomic loci; reads from IS256 should be reported as multi-mapping.
